previous_assumption: Stability classifier would produce a meaningful distribution (frozen/stable/volatile/disposable) on any repo with commits
correction: On a young, actively-developed repo like MATHA (all files touched in last 2 weeks), every file classifies as volatile. This is mathematically correct — changesPerMonth is high for all files. The classifier only produces a distribution on repos with history spanning months, not days. For Phase 2 consideration: a 'project_age' context flag could provide better UX messaging when the repo is too young for meaningful classification.
